resources.string: Are you sure you want to log out?
You can choose whether to export images too. Exporting images downloads and embeds them into the HTML, which may be slower.
When off, original image links are kept instead of converting them to base64.
The collection is empty, or content failed to load.
No exportable answers or articles. Skipped %1$d, failed %2$d.
After blocking, this user\'s content will no longer appear in recommendation feeds.
Log in to view following updates
Comment navigation is not supported yet. Opening the related answer instead.
Automatically mark the current notification batch as read after opening the notification page.
Auto-mark as read when opening notifications
Choose which notifications appear on the notification page.
Rule: answer with fewer than 10 votes from an author you do not follow
Rule: article from an author with fewer than 50 followers, or article with fewer than 20 votes
Rule: question with fewer than 5 answers and fewer than 50 followers
Collection detail is still in development
Column detail is still in development
This content cannot be opened yet
Swipe up or down to choose
This will clear all online and local browsing history for the current account.
Recommendations, smart filtering, keyword blocking, etc.
Combine Android and web recommendations and filter paid content.
Send login credentials when fetching recommendations.
Filter low-quality content by votes, follows, and similar signals.
Filter home items shown more than twice without being opened to reduce repeated recommendations.
Apply filter rules to followed users too. Turn this off to always show followed users.
Block content posted by specific users.
Block content when the answer question contains >= %1$d blocked topics.
When content contains at least this many blocked topics, it will be blocked.
Match and block promoted content containing xg.zhihu.com.
Match and block content containing d.zhihu.com or data-edu-card-id.
Match and block external articles containing mp.weixin.qq.com.
Block paid answers and articles exclusive to Zhihu Yanxuan members.
Only keep ads and paid content on the home page, and block everything else.
AI features are not available in this version.
A keyword task is running. Unload is disabled.
Use NLP to combine multiple keywords into phrases with AND logic. Example: "politics sensitive" matches content containing both topics.
Higher threshold means stricter matching; lower threshold means broader matching.
Paste feed content or enter any text
All keywords will be joined with spaces into one phrase.
Extract keywords above or add manually.
Separate keywords with spaces, e.g. politics sensitive
Separate keywords with spaces to express AND logic. Example: "politics sensitive" matches content containing both topics.
Separate keywords with spaces to express AND logic.
Clear all blocked records? This cannot be undone.
Tap the + button at bottom right to add a traditional keyword block.
Tap the + button at bottom right to add one.
Tap the + button at bottom right to add topics to block.
Tip: regular expressions allow more flexible matching, but syntax errors will make this keyword invalid.
Tip: you can get the user ID from the user profile URL.
Clear all blocked topics? This cannot be undone.
Enter the topic ID and name to block. The topic ID can be found in the Zhihu web topic link.
Cannot get the data required to block this user. Try opening the content detail page.
Cannot get the data required for keyword blocking. Try opening the content detail page.
Keywords were extracted from the content. Select keywords to block:
Tip: selected keywords will be joined with spaces into a phrase for NLP semantic matching.
Tip: NLP semantic similarity can filter similar topics even when wording differs.
Weights are calculated by TextRank. Higher values mean the keyword is more important in the content.
This software is for educational purposes only. Content is provided by Zhihu and copyright belongs to respective authors.
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes
Open Zhihu in a desktop browser and scan the login QR code here.
Align the login QR code with the scanner frame

I understand this app is developed and maintained by the open-source community, not officially developed, operated, acknowledged, or supported by Zhihu. I am responsible for all consequences of using it. I can download the official app at https://www.zhihu.com/app/.

While using this app, I agree to follow the Zhihu Terms of Use at https://www.zhihu.com/term/zhihu-terms. I will not infringe the copyrights of Zhihu or other authors, and all outputs produced by this app are only for personal browsing and backup, not redistribution or other copyright-impacting behavior.
I understand this app may collect anonymized usage information to estimate user count, and I can turn telemetry off in settings at any time.
Zhihu did not return a QR code link
Zhihu did not return a QR code token
Confirm login in the Zhihu app
Zhihu needs to verify the current network environment
Failed to fetch QR code. Please retry.
Article rendering now defaults to Compose

WebView article rendering is now off by default to provide advanced rendering features such as code highlighting and to fix many WebView-related bugs. The new renderer may still have bugs; please report them on GitHub, or re-enable WebView in settings.

Zhihu++ blocks Zhihu Yanxuan, Zhihu ad platform, Zhihu School, and WeChat Official Account articles by default. You can also manually block users, topics, questions, and other content. Because accurate blocking needs more detailed data and fetching that data takes time, affected items may briefly appear and then disappear.
Like recorded. Local recommendations will gradually learn.
Like received. This feature is being improved.
Lowered the priority of this type of local recommendation.
You recently prefer this type of source
You often open this type of source
The local recommendation database is not initialized correctly. Try restarting the app or clearing app data.
Local recommendations are building a candidate pool
The system first crawls followed updates, trending content, and related topics, then adjusts ranking based on your clicks and feedback.
Opening, liking, and disliking affect later ranking, but these learning signals are not uploaded as recommendation features.
Feedback received. This feature is being improved.
Login refresh failed. Please re-login if this persists.
Extract theme color from system wallpaper (Android 12+).\nTurn off to set a custom theme color.
Tap to pick your preferred theme color
Toolbar color for the in-app browser
Show article thumbnails in feed cards.
Show a draggable refresh button on pages.
Card style uses rounded cards; divider style separates items with thin lines.
When off, Compose rendering is used with advanced features like code highlighting.
Improves rendering performance but may cause compatibility issues.
Font set. Re-open article to take effect.
Auto-hide the answer title bar when scrolling.
Hide bottom action bar on scroll up; show again on scroll down.
Show a draggable quick-jump button on the answer page.
Fade out the skip button on scroll up; fade in on scroll down.
Move the publish/edit date to the top of the content.
Switch between answers under the same question via gesture.
Action performed on double-tapping answer content. Default is asking.
Only pages visible in the bottom bar are selectable.
Select Pages to Show in Bottom Bar
Tap Nav Bar to Scroll to Top / Refresh
Tap the active tab to scroll to top; if already at top, refresh. Double-tap to refresh directly.
Auto-hide Bottom Nav Bar on Scroll
Hide bottom navigation bar on scroll up; show again on scroll down.
Default behavior when tapping the share button.
Show Hot Search on Search Page
Show Zhihu trending keywords when the search page is blank.
Use custom navigation instead of system default. May improve gesture feel on some devices.
Enable Android 14+ predictive back gesture animation.
Enable all changes and hide floating buttons
Home: Move account entry to top avatar
Search bar style changes; tap avatar for account & settings; History entry can be moved to account page.
Remove custom styles; change Follow button icon.
Larger card radius, remove shadows; adjust background and card colors.
Move author to bottom; images no longer inline with small text; summary max 4 lines (was 3); normalize font styles.
Enabled by default; title font shrinks one level when disabled.
Redesigned title bar style; optimized show/hide logic.
Wrap bottom action buttons in pill shape; separate agree/disagree with animation.
These settings may change at any time or be merged into the mainline.\nWelcome to
to discuss these UI/UX changes and provide feedback.
Start page set to %1$s. Restart to take effect.
Used to access GitHub API without rate limiting. Leave blank for anonymous access; update checks may fail.
Check for new versions in the background after app launch and show update reminders on home screen.
Check for daily build versions (may be unstable).
Used only for usage statistics; no personal information is included.
You\'ve been browsing Zhihu for %1$d hours %2$d minutes. Take a break! Reopening within 5 minutes still counts as continuous use.
For code and feature feedback, please go to GitHub. The channels above are for user chat; developers may not always be available to answer questions.
Please discuss in the my-other-apps/zhihu-plus-plus channel
The group for another Zhihu client Hydrogen. You can discuss Zhihu++ there too.
Feel free to submit issues to discuss features and report bugs.
Update check failed. Tap to retry.
Download from a Chinese mirror without VPN; helps the author earn traffic. You can also use GitHub.
Enter the full cookie string, formatted like document.cookie, with \"; \" separating each cookie item.
Cookie set but verification failed. Please check if the cookie is valid.
Failed to parse valid cookie data
Enter a GET request URL to sign. Signature headers will be added automatically.
You have been browsing Zhihu for %1$s.\n\nTake a break.
Please log in again to continue using all features.
I enjoy studying natural language processing.
Natural language tasks always excite me.
This page uses the text2vec-base-chinese model to compute semantic similarity, making it easy to verify algorithm behavior on device.
Open on Computer (browser extension planned; tap to manually open from Collections)
Image load failed. Please report to the developer.
Cannot open video: unknown content type
Image with comments saved to gallery
Storage permission is required to export HTML. Requesting permission.
Storage permission is required to export images. Requesting permission.
Disabled for now. A third-party library will be used later.
Images are embedded as data URLs for offline viewing.
Add Zhihu++ open-source project note at the bottom
Cannot get answer paging; using default answer order.
Exported with Zhihu++, a free, open-source, ad-free third-party Zhihu client. Please star it. (GitHub: %1$s)
Zhihu++: Content to open in browser
Already read and author is not followed
Choose the default action after double-tapping an answer. The selection is saved immediately and can be changed later in Settings.
GitHub API URL for the latest release. Leave blank to use default.
CDN proxy for GitHub API (tried first). Leave blank to use default.
URL for checking nightly builds. Leave blank to use default.
